Why SynArc DAO?

Built for modern decentralized governance

On-Chain Voting

Transparent, immutable governance votes secured by the Arc Network.

Delegated Power

Delegate your voting power to trusted stewards or become one yourself.

Instant Execution

Automated proposal execution via timelock contracts post-quorum.

Cross-Chain

Governance that spans across the entire Arc ecosystem.
